claim: At ratio -2/9, with b1 in {9,12,15,30} (the only prompt b1 in {8,9,10,12,15,20,30} with integer realisation a2/b1^2=-2/9 since b1 must be 3*k, a2=-2*k^2), and free coefficients (a1,a0,b0) in [-5,5]^3, all 10624 stage-A-convergent deg-(2,1) PCFs (out of 10648 enumerated, 4 b1 values x 2*1331) classify as Desert/Rat/Alg under PSLQ on basis [1,L,pi,L*pi,pi^2,L*pi^2,log2,L*log2] with dps=100, N=600, residual<1e-30. Zero Trans, zero Log.

For b1 in {12,15,30}, offset ratios -2/9 +- 1/b1^2 with integer realisations (a2 in {-31,-33,-49,-51,-199,-201}; b1=20 has no integer realisation) and free (a1,a0,b0) in [-3,3]^3 yield zero Trans and zero Log across all 4116 stage-A-convergent families; pure desert at offsets, consistent with the prompt's prediction.
Trans-rate at ratio -2/9 (base sweep, H=5): b1=9 -> 0/2652, b1=12 -> 0/2650, b1=15 -> 0/2662, b1=30 -> 0/2660. b1 in {8,10,20} produce empty integer enumerations because 3 does not divide b1.

HALT condition triggered per prompt: Trans rate is 0 for ALL tested b1 >= 8 with non-empty convergent stratum at -2/9. Combined with the prior T2B-RESONANCE-B8-12 result (0 Trans at b1 in {8..12}, free range [-3,3]) this is consistent across two independent enumerations totalling >12000 convergent families at exact ratio -2/9 above b1=3.
